title: Trader Joe's Copycat Curried Chicken
description: A creamy curried chicken salad with Greek yogurt, carrots, raisins, and almonds — a copycat of the Trader Joe's deli favorite.

items: 2 tablespoons good quality curry powder, more or less to taste
1 lb raw chicken breast, poached and cubed
Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste (optional)

instructions: Whisk together honey, yogurt, mayonnaise, and curry powder in a small bowl and set aside. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Combine remaining ingredients in a large bowl and stir in desired amount of dressing.
